summary: Frontend testing of Mutual Hold Trade Phase 3 UI. Verified ProposeTradeModal with hold amount section, shield icons on ActiveTradeCard with tooltip, FAQ page updates. Critical issue: /trades route redirects to /honeypot, preventing access to TradeDetailModal with Pay Hold button and confirmation UI.

critical.issue: /trades route redirects to /honeypot (line 144), making TradesPage.js and TradeDetailModal inaccessible
critical.impact: Users cannot access: Pay Hold button, Hold Status section, Confirmation UI ('Yes, everything looks good' / 'There's an issue' buttons), Trade card hold badges, TradeDetailModal features

integration_issues.issue: ActiveTradeCard links to /trades which redirects to /honeypot, losing context and not showing TradeDetailModal

passed_tests: ProposeTradeModal shows HOLD AMOUNT section with Shield icon header
ProposeTradeModal hold amount input field present (data-testid='hold-amount-input')
ProposeTradeModal shows suggestion text: 'Suggested based on estimated record values. Both parties will be charged this amount and fully refunded on confirmed delivery.'
ProposeTradeModal validates $10 minimum hold amount with error message
Shield icons appear on ActiveTradeCard for hold-enabled trades (4 shield icons found)
Shield icon tooltip shows: 'Mutual hold trade — both parties have skin in the game.'
HOLD_PENDING status shows correct amber styling on trade cards
Active Trades filter correctly includes HOLD_PENDING status (5 active trades: 3 Hold Pending, 1 Shipping, 1 Proposed)
FAQ page 'What are the fees?' mentions Mutual Hold requirement
FAQ page has 'What is a Mutual Hold Trade?' entry under Trades section with detailed explanation
FAQ page Trades section is expandable and shows correct content
not_testable_due_to_routing: Pay Hold button (data-testid='pay-hold-btn') - TradesPage not accessible
Hold Status section (data-testid='hold-status-section') - TradesPage not accessible
Trade card hold badges (data-testid='trade-hold-badge') - TradesPage not accessible
Confirmation UI 'Yes, everything looks good' button (data-testid='confirm-receipt-btn') - TradesPage not accessible
Confirmation UI 'There's an issue' button (data-testid='open-dispute-btn') - TradesPage not accessible
TradeDetailModal with full trade management features - TradesPage not accessible
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /trades route - either remove redirect and render TradesPage, OR integrate TradeDetailModal into ISOPage.js Trade tab
Option A: Change App.js line 144 from 'Navigate to=/honeypot' to render TradesPage component
Option B: Add modal-based trade detail view to ISOPage.js ActiveTradeCard (click opens TradeDetailModal instead of navigating)
critical_code_review_comments: TradesPage.js line 144 in App.js: <Route path='/trades' element={<Navigate to='/honeypot' replace />} /> - This redirect makes the entire TradesPage inaccessible
TradesPage.js has full TradeDetailModal implementation with Pay Hold button, confirmation UI, but component is never rendered
ISOPage.js ActiveTradeCard links to /trades (line 848) which redirects, creating dead navigation
ProposeTradeModal correctly exports from TradesPage.js and is used in ISOPage.js - this works
ActiveTradeCard does NOT have data-testid='hold-shield-icon' attribute (should be added for testing)

success_rate.frontend: 55% (11 tests passed, 6 features not testable due to routing)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test trades created by previous testing agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mutual Hold UI implemented in TradesPage.js but inaccessible due to /trades redirect to /honeypot. ProposeTradeModal works correctly when accessed via ISOPage.js Trade tab listing detail. ActiveTradeCard shows shield icons with tooltip. The key fix needed is routing - either enable TradesPage render or move TradeDetailModal to ISOPage. Shield icons in ActiveTradeCard lack data-testid attribute.
screenshots_taken: trade_tab_content - Shows Active Trades with Hold Pending status and shield icons
shield_tooltip - Shows 'Mutual hold trade — both parties have skin in the game.' tooltip
propose_trade_modal - Shows HOLD AMOUNT section with $50.00 default value
faq_fees_expanded - Shows updated fees FAQ mentioning Mutual Hold
faq_mutual_hold_expanded - Shows new 'What is a Mutual Hold Trade?' FAQ entry
